new_articles.title: Why the huge premium on SK Hynix’s U.S. listing may prove short-lived.
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Why the huge premium on SK Hynix’s U.S. listing may prove short-lived.'이다. If the Korean depository allows conversion, then the ADR premium on SK Hynix may contract. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: US$402,000 bonus splits Samsung device and chip workers as anger, feud mount
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'US$402,000 bonus splits Samsung device and chip workers as anger, feud mount'이다. The feud between Samsung Electronics’ device-making and chipmaking divisions is deepening, as employees in the smartphone and home appliance businesses are expressing anger over a nearly 100-fold compensation gap between them and employees in the chipmaking division. Samsung Electronics Company Union (SECU), which is mostly made up of employees in the appliance-making Device Experience (DX) division, will hold a rally under a “same company, same rights” slogan at the company’s plant in Suwon,. . Samsung Electronics Company Union (SECU), which is mostly made up of employees in the appliance-making Device Experience (DX) division, will hold a rally under a “same company, same rights” slogan at the company’s plant in Suwon, Gyeonggi province on Thursday to protest against the compensation gap between the divisions and urge management to address the issue A day earlier, the National Samsung Electronics Union, which has 22,700 members, set up a memorial altar at the Suwon plant, calling it “the day the DX division was confirmed to have been abandoned by management and declared dead” The union argued that Samsung Electronics was able to grow in the past because operating profits generated by the DX division served as a common financial resource for investment in the chipmaking business However, employees in the DX division have now been excluded from the distribution of performance incentives when the chip industry is booming, the union said Although Samsung Electronics’ DX and DS divisions have been operating as separate organisations within the same company, the recent wage agreement is strengthening the silo mentality between the two divisions. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: CNBC Daily Open: A chip off the AI block
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'CNBC Daily Open: A chip off the AI block'이다. With the chip sector at the center of market volatility, ASML raises guidance, IBM massively disappoints and SK Hynix regains some confidence. SK Hynix bounces back, lifting the broader sector Crude prices remain elevated as the U CEO Arvind Krishna blamed the shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business, as clients shifted spending toward hardware purchases such as memory chips Meanwhile, South Korea's SK Hynix has bounced back during the Asian trading day on Wednesday, leading a broad rally across the sector Despite Wednesday's rebound, some investors warned that enthusiasm around AI-linked hardware stocks is becoming stretched. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix’s US-listed shares soar to 51% premium over South Korean stock
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix’s US-listed shares soar to 51% premium over South Korean stock'이다. The US listing has eased global investor access to the key AI memory chipmaker. PHOTO: REUTERS Published Jul 15, 2026, 12:19 PM Updated Jul 15, 2026, 12:32 PM New York – The premium for SK Hynix’s American depositary receipts (ADRs) over its South Korean shares soared to more than 50 per cent, just three days after their US trading debut The US listing has eased global investor access to key AI memory chipmaker SK Hynix, while taking some steam out of the blistering rally in its South Korean stock Each SK Hynix ADR is equivalent to a 10th of a common share, according to a filing with the US Securities and Exchange Commission SK Hynix shares rose as much as 13 per cent in South Korea on July 15 , following the New York gains BLOOMBERG More on this topic SK Hynix shares plunge 15. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: SK Hynix shares surge 13% on AI hopes as US tech stocks resume their climb
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix shares surge 13% on AI hopes as US tech stocks resume their climb'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, July 15 : Shares in SK Hynix jumped nearly 13 per cent in Seoul on Wednesday, tracking gains in U. S. tech stocks after softer-than-expected U. inflation data, while upbeat analyst views on the outlook for AI memory demand also supported sentiment. The rally lifted other South Korean semiconductor stoc.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix is a golden goose that has to lay more eggs
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix is a golden goose that has to lay more eggs'이다. Talk about K-power. South Korea’s SK Hynix Inc has raised US$26. 5 billion from the US stock market, the biggest first-time share sale by a foreign company. The question now is whether the trillion-dollar firm can satisfy competing demands from exacting stakeholders. Investor enthusiasm stems from. SK Hynix is generating record profit now, but do not forget that it was in the red only three years ago While institutional investors might be buying SK Hynix’s shares at their own risk, billionaire Chey does have millions of small investors to answer to, especially in a society that prizes egalitarian values These retail investors have already been penalized as SK Hynix’s Seoul-listed shares have whipsawed in recent weeks, creating losses due to a phenomenon known as volatility decay If SK Hynix cannot continue to deliver outsized profits and retail investors’ bets backfire, there might be real wealth destruction among South Korea’s middle class SK Hynix’s blockbuster US listing signals South Korea’s arrival on the global economic stage, but it also brings with it potential societal pitfalls.

matched_articles.title: SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder'이다. One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight. shares One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds with exposure to the South Korean chip sensation stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight in the run-up to SK Hynix's U Almost a dozen ETF issuers filed for leveraged single-stock funds tied to SK, many of which began trading on Tuesday There's also the huge success of the DRAM ETF, now with $23 billion in assets, of which SK Hynix is the third-biggest holding "Those ETFs – double long, double short – that's a lot of demand that maybe got taken away but I'm sure we'll see a pickup in volume when they list the weeklies," said Scott Bauer, CEO of Chicago-based Prosper Trading Academy watch now watch now VIDEO 00:56 Options flows around financials show bullish sentiment Oliver Renick Retail-trader 'bottleneck bros' eyeing AI supply chain can't wait for SK Hynix options Oliver Renick Oil volatility is creating a 'win-win' trade strategy Michael Khouw Read More. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Wall Street banks see AI 'super cycle' set to boost deals, financing
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Wall Street banks see AI 'super cycle' set to boost deals, financing'이다. Investment banks have reaped strong ​fees from AI-related deals, including SK Hynix's $26. 5 billion ADR offering and SpaceX's record $86 billion initial public offering, as well as debt issuance. Listen to this article in summarized format A rush by technology companies to fund AI infrastructure is boosting dealmaking and financing activity for Wall Street, bankers said on Tuesday, generating lucrative fees from capital raising and loans Investment banks have reaped strong ​fees from AI-related deals, including SK Hynix's $26 Rival OpenAI has also filed ⁠for a ‌U Citigroup, which was a joint global co-ordinator on the SK Hynix sale, earned over $70 ​million from the deal AI ​dominating conversations: Citi Citi CEO Jane Fraser told investors on its conference call that AI was "dominating ⁠a lot of the conversation" with spending on technology, data centers, energy and ​defense accelerating. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: Chip toolmaker ASML expected to shine light on capacity and China challenges
matched_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Chip toolmaker ASML expected to shine light on capacity and China challenges'이다. The Netherlands-based business is Europe's most ​valuable listed company with a market capitalisation of €610 billion ($696 billion) after the AI boom helped to lift its share price by nearly 70% this year as memory chip makers such as SK Hynix, Samsung and Micron rush to add capacity. Listen to this article in summarized format ASML, the biggest supplier of equipment used to manufacture AI chips, reports quarterly earnings on Wednesday ​looking to justify its chunky valuation and demonstrate ​how it will contend with U moves to block exports to China The Netherlands-based business is Europe's most ​valuable listed company with a market capitalisation of €610 billion ($696 billion) after the AI boom helped to lift its share price by nearly 70% this year as memory chip makers such as SK Hynix, Samsung and Micron rush to add capacity Biggest customer TSMC, which makes Nvidia's chips, is also expanding while Intel's recovery and ‌Elon Musk's TeraFab plans ⁠could add ⁠further demand Export controls clouding outlook Clouding the outlook, however, is a proposed U. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
